What We Offer

Signature Décor Services

800+Events Done
98%Happy Clients
12+Years Experience
4Cities Served
🎈

Balloon Decorations

Stunning balloon arches, columns, garlands, and custom sculptures in every color palette. From intimate setups to grand event halls — we do it all.

🚗

Car Decorations

Premium wedding car and event vehicle styling. Floral arrangements, ribbon bows, personalised signage, and LED lighting that turns every car into a statement.

🌫️

Fog & Smoke Effects

Low-lying fog, dry ice effects, and haze machines that create a surreal, cinematic atmosphere for entrances, first dances, and photoshoots.

✨

Sparkles & Pyro

Cold spark machines, sparkler tunnels, confetti cannons and LED fountain sparklers — safe indoor pyrotechnics that create breathtaking visual moments.
